entries.note: V59-C reuses the shipped V59-A continuity region/admission/occupancy/reintegration surfaces and the shipped V59-B continuity-safe restoration handoff/restoration/reintegration surfaces by default.

V59-C adds one advisory-only and candidate-only workspace continuity hardening register over the exact observed-and-restored continuity-bound create_new exemplar only; it does not become a family migration surface.
V59-C requires the recommendation function to stay extensional and replayable: same selected evidence basis plus same frozen policy anchor yields the same advisory outcome.
V59-C carries one explicit frozen policy anchor in the hardening register so replayability and advisory grounding are declared rather than ambient.

V59-C carries forward the shipped V59-B restoration-time continuation verdict, prior governed-state baseline-match verdict, and bounded compensating-scope match posture explicitly at the advisory layer.
V59-C keeps repeated continuity lineage roots non-independent for escalation support; traceability may increase without counting the same bounded lineage more than once.
